CustomField.description: Formula (currency, 2 decimals) showing amount on the document /**The Below transaction types will be considered NULL 'MR Invoice' 'MR Invoice Reconciliation' 'MR Contribution Applied' 'MR Claim' 'MR Rebate' 'MR Manual Payable' 'Payable - MR Reconciliation' 'MR Invoice Adjustment' 'MR Invoice Credit (Adjustment)' 'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Applied' ***/
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c)=='Opening Balance',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__c),0,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Starting_MR_Balance__c),IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c)=='MR Invoice Overpayment Credit',leaseworks__AmtCC_CM__c,IF(CONTAINS(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c),'Payment'),leaseworks__AmtCC_PLI__c,IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c)=='MR Contribution Used',leaseworks__AmtCC_Payout__c,IF(CONTAINS(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c),'Claim'),leaseworks__AmtCC_Payout__c,IF(CONTAINS(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c),'Payout'),leaseworks__AmtCC_Payout__c,IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c)=='Adjustment', IF(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Adjust_Cash_Collected_Amount__c==true, leaseworks__SRAT__c, null),IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c)=='MR Transfer',leaseworks__AmtCC_Other__c,IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c)=='MR Lessor Commitment Amount Used',leaseworks__AmtCC_Other__c,NULL)))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing invoiced amount as per the source Document. This amount affects Running Balance (Cash). Zero for non-approved transactions and transactions updating only Invoice balance
CustomField.label: Amount(Cash Collected)
